narrative: The Greenfield Collective cultivation facility (CDPH-10003456-LIC, CA Type 3B) reconciled its daily METRC inventory at 18:00 PST with zero variance against the Metrc package tags assigned at trim. All flower lots departing for distribution carried a printed transport manifest with originating and destination license numbers, driver agent badge ID, and a GPS-logged route between licensed premises only. Lab COAs from a CA-licensed Type 8 testing laboratory cleared pesticide, residual solvent, heavy metal, microbial, and potency panels, with reported THC at 22.4% printed on the label within 4.8% of the COA value. Cash deposits above 10K were filed with the cannabis-compliant credit union under the FinCEN 2014 marijuana SAR framework. Packaging used opaque, child-resistant pouches certified to ASTM D3475, with no cartoon imagery and the universal cannabis symbol. The dispensary is sited 1,140 ft from the nearest K-12 school, exceeding the 600 ft state minimum. §280E COGS allocation was prepared by the cannabis-specialist CPA.
